zh.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh.Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland, United Ki: 英國蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland於1347年出生在英國蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭時，他的父親William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland38歲，母親Joan Menteith33歲。他於1389年與Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1427年在他的家鄉享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland于1347年出生在英国苏格兰薩瑟蘭时，他的父亲William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland38岁，母亲Joan Menteith33岁。他于1389年与Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1427年在他的家乡享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutherland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness): habitational name from the Scottish county of Sutherland, named with Old Norse súthr ‘south, southern’ + land ‘land’ because the territory lay south of Scandinavia and the Norse colonies in the Orkney and Shetland Islands.
History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan associated with the county of Sutherland.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland was born in 1347, in Sutherland, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland, was 38 and his mother, Joan Menteith, was 33. He married Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan in 1389, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1427, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland est né en 1347, à Sutherland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan Menteith, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan en 1389, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1427, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland 1347 in Sutherland, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland 38 und seine Mutter Joan Menteith 33. Er hat 1389 in Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1427 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland è nato il nel 1347 nel Sutherland, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Joan Menteith, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan nel 1389, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1427, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherlandが1347年にイギリススコットランドススエルランドで生まれた時，父William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherlandは38歳，母Joan Menteithは33歳であった。1389年にイギリススコットランドでLady Margaret Stewart of Buchanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1427年に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland(이)가 1347년 영국 스코틀랜드 서덜랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Menteith(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1389년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1427년 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland nasceu em 1347, em Sutherland, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan Menteith, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan em 1389, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1427, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland родился в 1347 г. в местности сутирланд, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Menteith, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan в 1389 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1427 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland nació en 1347, en Sutherland, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Joan Menteith, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan en 1389, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1427, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años.
